intro_medical: ^Three years of dreaming of a white coat, of a stethoscope around your neck.
^Then Baba died, and the tuition money evaporated.
^Now you watch your mother cough into a worn handkerchief.
intro_prisoner: ^The cell door opened eight months ago.
^Your mother aged ten years in the two you were inside.
^The neighbors whisper. The amn el-dawla file never really closes.
intro_sudanese: ^You still dream of the Nile in Khartoum.
^Before the jets came. Before your mother grabbed you and said, 'We leave now.'
^That was three years ago. Cairo was supposed to be temporary.
^Home is this cramped apartment in Matareya.
